mappings.original_caption: Small blue engine silhouette vignette — puffing along with smoke rings
Title page illustration — blue engine pulling colorful train over snowy mountain with toy animals (giraffe, elephant) visible in cars
1930 color plate — shiny black passenger engine passing by on adjacent track, toy train cars with dolls and toys visible, power lines and trees
1930 color plate — wide establishing shot of train landscape with mountain in background
1930 color plate — stopped engine at tracks, toys and dolls gathered around pleading: clown, soldier, doll, giraffe, duck. Mountain with blue sky behind
1949 color plate — big black engine at station, toys/dolls pleading on tracks. Clown, soldier, doll, duck visible. Mountain in background
1949 color plate — enormous red passenger engine looming in foreground with billowing smoke, tiny toy train behind. Giraffe visible. Scale contrast
1949 color plate — shiny black passenger engine steaming past on adjacent track, toys waving from colorful red and yellow cars
1949 B&W — big black freight engine on adjacent track with toy train below. Mountain behind. Clown approaching
1949 B&W — large freight engine departing on adjacent track, toy train with giraffe and elephant on lower track. Clown on tracks between
1949 color plate — yellow engine with roundhouse behind, steam curling from stack. Approaching slowly
1949 color plate — green engine with sad downturned face departing. Clown on tracks with flag. Snowy hills behind
1949 B&W — two trains on parallel tracks: big engine departing above, small bright engine approaching below. Mountain behind
1949 B&W — little engine with uncertain expression looking up at mountain and departing bigger engine. Scale and difficulty contrast
1930 B&W — little engine approaching toy train on tracks. Clown standing by. Mountain looming behind. The moment of decision
1949 color plate — blue engine coupled to colorful toy train, starting up mountain. Toys cheering: giraffe, elephant, clown visible. The climb begins
1949 color plate — blue engine pulling train up steep mountain slope. Trees below, clouds near. Train at steep angle. THE iconic climb image
1930 B&W — engine straining up steepest part of mountain, dramatic angle. Effort and difficulty visible
1930 B&W — engine and train cresting mountain ridge. Moment of triumph at the summit
1949 B&W — train rolling down far side of mountain. Engine has big smile. Speed, momentum, joyful descent
1930 B&W — train arriving, celebration scene. Delivery complete
1949 B&W — endpiece vignette: small black train silhouette puffing contentedly. Smoke rings rising gently
